# NVIDIA Content Agents Full Agent Index

Repository: `NVIDIA-Omniverse/content-agents`

Content Agents provides OpenUSD/USD workflow agents for VLM-based material
assignment, physics property classification, AI texture generation, and
Validation Agent research-preview workflows.

## Product Workflows

| Workflow | Primary docs | CLI command | Service docs |
|---|---|---|---|
| Material Agent | `apps/material_agent/README.md` | `material-agent run apps/material_agent/configs/unified_example.yaml` | `apps/material_agent_service/README.md` |
| Physics Agent | `apps/physics_agent/README.md` | `physics-agent run apps/physics_agent/configs/lightbulb.yaml` | `apps/physics_agent_service/README.md` |
| Texture Agent | `apps/texture_agent/README.md` | `texture-agent run apps/texture_agent/configs/texture_example.yaml` | `apps/texture_agent_service/README.md` |
| Validation Agent (Research Preview) | `apps/validation_agent/README.md` | `validation-agent run apps/validation_agent/examples/configs/steel_scaffold_behavior_refine_summary.yaml` | CLI/Python contracts only in release 0.4 |

## Setup

Use `README.md` as the canonical quick start.

For local CLI mode:

```bash
uv venv --python=3.12
source .venv/bin/activate
uv pip install -e . -e apps/material_agent -e apps/physics_agent -e apps/texture_agent -e apps/validation_agent
./scripts/fetch_build_resources.sh
```

For service mode, run Docker Compose from the repo root and pass the repo-root
environment file:

```bash
docker compose --env-file .env -f apps/material_agent_service/docker-compose.yml up --build
docker compose --env-file .env -f apps/physics_agent_service/docker-compose.yml up --build
docker compose --env-file .env -f apps/texture_agent_service/docker-compose.yml up --build
```

## Runtime Prerequisites

- Python 3.12+
- `uv`
- Docker Compose v2.24+ for REST service mode
- NVIDIA driver and NVIDIA Container Toolkit for bundled GPU rendering sidecars
- A VLM provider key in `.env`

Public VLM backends:

| Backend | Env var |
|---|---|
| `nim` | `NVIDIA_API_KEY` |
| `openai` | `OPENAI_API_KEY` |
| `anthropic` | `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` |
| `gemini` | `GOOGLE_API_KEY` |

## Agent Guidance

- Generic coding agents: `AGENTS.md`
- Claude Code: `CLAUDE.md`
- Short machine-readable index: `llms.txt`
- Full machine-readable index: `llms-full.txt`

Start coding agents from the repo root. Keep API keys in `.env`; do not print,
commit, or paste secrets into chat.

## Public Skill Inventory

Canonical skills live under `.agents/skills/`. `.codex/skills/` and
`.claude/skills/` mirror the same content for agents that expect tool-specific
skill directories.

| Task | Canonical skill | Codex mirror | Claude mirror |
|---|---|---|---|
| Quick local POC | `.agents/skills/quickstart` | `.codex/skills/quickstart` | `.claude/skills/quickstart` |
| Material CLI | `.agents/skills/material-agent-cli` | `.codex/skills/material-agent-cli` | `.claude/skills/material-agent-cli` |
| Material service client | `.agents/skills/material-agent-client` | `.codex/skills/material-agent-client` | `.claude/skills/material-agent-client` |
| Material Docker deploy | `.agents/skills/deploy-material-agent-docker` | `.codex/skills/deploy-material-agent-docker` | `.claude/skills/deploy-material-agent-docker` |
| Physics CLI | `.agents/skills/physics-agent-cli` | `.codex/skills/physics-agent-cli` | `.claude/skills/physics-agent-cli` |
| Physics service client | `.agents/skills/physics-agent-client` | `.codex/skills/physics-agent-client` | `.claude/skills/physics-agent-client` |
| Physics Docker deploy | `.agents/skills/deploy-physics-agent-docker` | `.codex/skills/deploy-physics-agent-docker` | `.claude/skills/deploy-physics-agent-docker` |
| Texture CLI | `.agents/skills/texture-agent-cli` | `.codex/skills/texture-agent-cli` | `.claude/skills/texture-agent-cli` |
| Texture service client | `.agents/skills/texture-agent-client` | `.codex/skills/texture-agent-client` | `.claude/skills/texture-agent-client` |
| Texture Docker deploy | `.agents/skills/deploy-texture-agent-docker` | `.codex/skills/deploy-texture-agent-docker` | `.claude/skills/deploy-texture-agent-docker` |
| Validation CLI (Research Preview) | `.agents/skills/validation-agent-cli` | `.codex/skills/validation-agent-cli` | `.claude/skills/validation-agent-cli` |
| OVRTX Docker deploy | `.agents/skills/deploy-ovrtx-docker` | `.codex/skills/deploy-ovrtx-docker` | `.claude/skills/deploy-ovrtx-docker` |
| Full collection deploy | `.agents/skills/deploy-collection` | `.codex/skills/deploy-collection` | `.claude/skills/deploy-collection` |
| Brev CLI lifecycle | `.agents/skills/brev-cli` | `.codex/skills/brev-cli` | `.claude/skills/brev-cli` |
| Hosted Qwen VLM endpoint | `.agents/skills/deploy-qwen-vlm-brev` | `.codex/skills/deploy-qwen-vlm-brev` | `.claude/skills/deploy-qwen-vlm-brev` |
| Hosted image generation endpoint | `.agents/skills/deploy-image-gen-brev` | `.codex/skills/deploy-image-gen-brev` | `.claude/skills/deploy-image-gen-brev` |
| Hosted embeddings endpoint | `.agents/skills/deploy-embeddings-brev` | `.codex/skills/deploy-embeddings-brev` | `.claude/skills/deploy-embeddings-brev` |
| Hosted Material Agent | `.agents/skills/deploy-material-agent-brev` | `.codex/skills/deploy-material-agent-brev` | `.claude/skills/deploy-material-agent-brev` |
| Hosted Physics Agent | `.agents/skills/deploy-physics-agent-brev` | `.codex/skills/deploy-physics-agent-brev` | `.claude/skills/deploy-physics-agent-brev` |
| Hosted Texture Agent | `.agents/skills/deploy-texture-agent-brev` | `.codex/skills/deploy-texture-agent-brev` | `.claude/skills/deploy-texture-agent-brev` |
| Flatten USD | `.agents/skills/flatten-usd` | `.codex/skills/flatten-usd` | `.claude/skills/flatten-usd` |
| Print USD hierarchy | `.agents/skills/print-usd` | `.codex/skills/print-usd` | `.claude/skills/print-usd` |
| Render USD | `.agents/skills/render-usd` | `.codex/skills/render-usd` | `.claude/skills/render-usd` |
| Generate images | `.agents/skills/image-gen` | `.codex/skills/image-gen` | `.claude/skills/image-gen` |
| Analyze images | `.agents/skills/vision` | `.codex/skills/vision` | `.claude/skills/vision` |

## Validation Commands

Use focused checks before expensive GPU, Docker, VLM, or rendering work:

```bash
python3 -m pytest tests/test_public_quickstart_regression.py -q
python3 -m pytest tests/test_packaging_requests_declared.py tests/test_pyproject_fallback_version.py -q
```

If the environment lacks test dependencies:

```bash
uv pip install -e ".[dev]"
```

## Expected Success Signals

- Material Agent CLI writes a working directory for the configured session and
  reports the final materialized USD/render output paths in logs.
- Validation Agent CLI writes `validation_request.json`,
  `validation_plan.json`, and `validation_result.json` under the selected
  output directory, with a CI-oriented verdict and per-template statuses.
- Physics Agent CLI writes prediction artifacts and reports generated physics
  results for the configured asset.
- Texture Agent CLI writes generated texture artifacts, a textured USD/USDZ,
  and `artifacts_manifest.json` under the configured working directory.
- REST services expose FastAPI endpoints and return session status/results for
  submitted assets.

If a run fails before VLM calls, retry with `--dry-run` and verify config paths,
provider API keys, and render endpoint settings.
